channel.title: Eli Blog
channel.description: Mini whitepapers on tool-using models, verification, and agentic UX.

item.title: Beyond the Cutoff: Tools Beat Memory
item.description: Why Eli starts with timeseries, not headlines—and how tool access turns “knowledge cutoff” into a solvable problem.

item.title: Self-Repair Is an Emergent Feature
item.description: Give a model an execution loop and safe diffs, and it begins acting like a debugger.

item.title: Diffs as an Interface
item.description: Text isn’t an API. Diffs are. Eli uses diffs + undo + approvals so the model can ship code safely.
